profile.summary: Results-driven Software Engineer with 3.5+ years of experience building and delivering enterprise-grade .NET applications in Agile environments. Proven expertise in full-stack development, CI/CD automation, and applied machine learning — including deep learning models deployed on datasets exceeding 500,000 entries. Currently advancing in AI/ML through a graduate degree, with hands-on experience in neural networks, computer vision, and data-driven decision systems.

bullets.bullet: Led full lifecycle development of 'CKYC', a mission-critical .NET application using MVC and Repository design patterns in a Scrum team; resolved critical bugs and maintained high performance under production load.
Developed the 'Aadhaar Masking' feature using a deep learning OCR model (Faster R-CNN, TensorFlow, Keras), achieving precise text detection and data security across a dataset of 500,000+ records.
Engineered and maintained 'CRM', a security analytics application in C#/.NET, utilizing Unit of Work and Repository patterns to enhance threat detection and system reliability.
Implemented high-priority hotfixes during Kanban sprints, demonstrating rapid problem-solving while adhering to SOLID principles to maintain code quality and system stability.
Authored comprehensive unit test suites in NUnit/C# with mocking frameworks, achieving broad test coverage and safeguarding software integrity across multiple projects.
Integrated Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) practices, automating build/deploy workflows and significantly reducing manual intervention.
Designed and built a responsive company website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, showcasing construction project portfolios with intuitive navigation and modern UI/UX.
Developed a JavaScript-powered ChatBot integrated into the existing web infrastructure to handle customer queries and improve response time.
Collaborated cross-functionally with project managers and marketing to ensure brand alignment, conducting performance and usability testing for optimal load times.

project.name: Your Full Name
project.description: Built a Windows screenshot application that automates Excel report generation with organized, annotated screenshots, incorporating image cropping and color marker tools. Significantly reduced documentation time for manual testing teams.

project.name: Your Full Name
project.description: Designed an autonomous drone with GPS tracking, real-time data transmission, and voice/facial recognition. Implemented a CNN-based facial recognition model trained on 10,000+ images, achieving 86.5% identification accuracy.

project.name: Your Full Name
project.description: Performed EDA on agricultural datasets to forecast market trends. Implemented a K-Nearest Neighbors classifier with visualizations to improve predictive accuracy for new data inputs.

project.name: Your Full Name
project.description: Developed a browser-based 3D modeling tool using Django, enabling real-time object creation, modification, and rendering in a collaborative environment.

activity.description: Volunteered to donate food and clothing to underprivileged communities, organize school cleaning drives, and distribute stationery to support government primary school students.
